title: Consent
description:
Permission or Agreement obtained from someone or something having authority or power

Permission for something to happen or agreement to do something.

Comment:
- Consent is a permission or agreement granted by a Party having the appropriate authority, authorizing another Party or system to perform defined actions such as processing data, initiating communications, or using services within a specified scope, purpose, and validity period, and in accordance with applicable legal, regulatory, or contractual requirements.

- Consent is an explicit permission or agreement provided by an authorized Party that allows specified actions to be carried out under defined conditions.

ConsentPurpose.description: Specifies what action or activity the consent authorizes. It defines the reason for which permission is granted. E.g., Marketing, Data Processing, Personalization, Service Enablement, Third-Party Data Sharing

ConsentChannel.description: Identifies how or through which medium the authorized action may be carried out. E.g., Phone, Email, SMS, Mobile App, Website, Social Media, Postal Mail

ConsentStatus.description: Indicates the current enforceability of the consent. Only active consents may be used. E.g., Granted, Withdrawn, Pending, Expired, Suspended

ConsentValidity.description: Defines the time period or conditions under which the consent remains effective. E.g., Start Date, End Date, One-time, Ongoing until withdrawn

ConsentGrantor.description: Identifies who provided the consent and confirms that they have the authority to do so. E.g., Individual Customer, Legal Representative, Authorized Signatory, Guardian
